tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and imagine letting go of something you're holding tightly, symbolizing surrendering control to God

two_step.reflect_question: How do you view power and servanthood in your relationships?

options.text: I tend to seek personal advantage
options.response: Practice intentional humility this week by serving someone without expecting recognition
Meditate on Jesus' teaching that the last will be first in God's kingdom

options.text: I want to grow in servant leadership
options.response: Identify one practical way to serve in your community this month

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a picture of yourself as a child approaching Jesus, showing what you would want to ask Him

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged your understanding of status and importance?
options: I see true greatness differently now
I recognize my need to be more humble
I want to prioritize serving others
I'm wrestling with Jesus' radical teachings

three_choice.question: Which transformative moment in Mark 10 resonates most deeply?

choices.expansion: True spiritual reception requires becoming vulnerable and humble like a child.
Genuine discipleship demands radical surrender of material attachments.
Persistent faith can breakthrough seemingly insurmountable barriers.

socratic_nudge.question: What prevents you from completely surrendering your perceived securities to follow an unconditional calling?

moral_slider.question: How do personal possessions balance with spiritual commitment?

reevaluation.question: How has your understanding of discipleship shifted?
options: Cost of following is higher than I realized
Vulnerability is a strength, not weakness

thematic_summaries.title: Marriage and Divorce
thematic_summaries.summary: Jesus provides profound teachings on the sanctity of marriage, emphasizing original divine intent over cultural practices. He challenges contemporary divorce norms by highlighting the spiritual covenant of marriage.

thematic_summaries.title: Servant Leadership and Kingdom Values
thematic_summaries.summary: Jesus radically redefines leadership through teachings of humility, service, and sacrificial love. He demonstrates that true greatness in God's kingdom comes through selflessness and childlike faith.

reevaluation.question: How does Jesus' teaching on marriage and divorce challenge contemporary relationship paradigms?
options: Marriage is a divine covenant transcending legal frameworks
Spiritual commitment supersedes cultural marriage practices
Redemption and grace are central even in marital brokenness
Individual interpretation should respect original divine design
